commands.review_summary:
The PR adds opt-in terminal fallback metadata and result helpers across agent-core, plugin SDK tool plugins, embedded-agent runtime/subscription handling, cron/web_fetch, docs, and Docker dist cleanup.

PR surface: Source +2718, Tests +6987, Docs +79, Generated 0, Other +3. Total +9787 across 69 files.

Reproducibility: unclear. for the original live Discord bug because I did not independently reproduce current-main channel behavior. The source gap is clear: current main has no terminal fallback metadata path, while the PR adds one through agent-core, subscribe handling, and tool definitions.
